ModMetaData.name: Empire: Vanilla Outposts Expanded Integration
ModMetaData.author: Matathias
ModMetaData.description: Integrates Vanilla Outposts Expanded with Empire's military and tax systems. Outposts become raid targets with 24-hour warnings, defensive outposts can auto-defend nearby Empire settlements, and you can redirect tax deliveries and silver payments to VOE outposts.
